title: allium chinense
intro: Allium chinense, also known as garlic, is a species of plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its pungent smell and taste. The medicinal properties of Allium chinense lie in its antibacterial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing cholesterol levels, lowering blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Allium chinense include fresh or dried cloves, which can be consumed raw or cooked, or used in supplements and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
